title: BBS mod (minimal modpack)
description: Minimal modpack to start working with BBS mod on Fabric and Forge!
body:
This is a minimal modpack to quickly get started with using BBS mod on Farbic 1.20.4 and Forge 1.20.1! BBS mod is a content creators suite where you can create animated scenes, import custom models by morphing into them, or as an item, replace certain entity types, and more!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3wRAUymltj0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This modpack features BBS mod, Fabric API, Sodium, and Iris.
